items.title: Tyler Herro to Detroit in Giannis Trade? Timberwolves Guard Options, and More | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: We catch up on today’s recent reports largely surrounding Tyler Herro, Detroit’s quest for more shooting, the Wolves desire for a starting point guard, and fake Trey Murphy and Ja Morant trades. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter: https://twitter.com/YossiGozlan BlueSky:…

items.title: San Antonio Spurs 2026 Mock Offseason and Preview | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Jared Weiss makes his Third Apron debut in an offseason discussion on the Spurs. We touch on the De’Aaron Fox dilemma, contract projections for Victor Wembanyama and Julian Champagnie, and analyze the trade market for upgrades at the four. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter:…

items.title: Pushing the Spurs Over the Top - 2026 Offseason Preview
items.body_excerpt: The Spurs just joined a small list of teams that went from the lottery in one season to title contention in the next. They were supposed to make the jump into the playoffs next season and slowly collect their postseason bruises. Instead, their young core ignored those “rules” by…
